title: Premier Decorations 1000 Vintage Gold LED Treebrights with Multi Action Facility and Timer Function
features: According to the EU Energy Efficiency Labelling directive, this product does not require energy labelling information.
Premier Decorations 1000 Vintage Gold LED Treebrights with Multi Action Facility and Timer Function
description: Premier Decorations Lv162179Vg Led Lights Set Of 1000 Gold Leds With Multifunction Control Box And Memory Combination. The Twinkling, Multi Colored Lights Provide A Variety Of Lighting For Your Tree This Christmas, Offering A Combination Of Light Displays In Static, Waves, Sequential, Flashing Chase, Steady On, Slow Glow And Slow Fade. Also Included Is A Timer Function That Allows Your Lights To Turn On For 8 Hours And Automatically Turn Off For 16 Hours Each Day. The Product Code For This Premier Decorations Led Tree Light Set Is Lv162179Vg. Supabright Bulbs Are Energy Efficient, Durable And Long Lasting, Making Them A Perfect Addition To Your Christmas Tree. Mains Operated And Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Use. Must Be Plugged Into An Indoor Socket Or Appropriately Covered Outdoor Socket And Is Supplied With A Green Cable.
